mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_admin (community_id, username, password, real_name, phone_number, role, status, login_fail_count, password_expire_time, must_change_password, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phoneNumber}, #{role}, #{status}, #{loginFailCount}, #{passwordExpireTime}, #{mustChangePassword}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, username, password, real_name, phone_number, role, status, login_fail_count, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_expire_time, must_change_password, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time FROM sys_admin WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_admin WHERE role = #{role} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_admin SET password = #{password}, must_change_password = #{mustChangePassword}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
